AnalyticsBucket.description: One time-bucket aggregate for a single metric over the bucket interval — the derived series the dashboard charts (platform interfaces §3, analytics surface). The bucket spans [bucket_start, bucket_start + interval).

bucket_start.description: Start of the bucket window (RFC 3339 UTC, ms).

min.description: Minimum sample value in the bucket (the metric's RFC-007 units).

max.description: Maximum sample value in the bucket (the metric's RFC-007 units).

avg.description: Mean sample value in the bucket (the metric's RFC-007 units).

count.description: Number of raw samples aggregated into the bucket.

AnalyticsResponse.description: Aggregated, time-bucketed telemetry for one greenhouse over [from, to] — the derived-series read surface the dashboard uses for trend charts, distinct from the raw TelemetryRange seed (platform interfaces §3; data model §4). Buckets are evenly spaced at `interval`; a metric with no samples in the window has an empty array.

from.description: Start of the aggregated window (RFC 3339 UTC, ms), echoing the request.

to.description: End of the aggregated window (RFC 3339 UTC, ms), echoing the request.

interval.description: Time-bucket size used for the aggregation, echoing the request (default 1h).

series.description: Map of metric name to its ordered buckets over the window. Keys are the RFC-007 metric names (temperature, humidity, co2, par, vpd, soil_moisture).
